gateway_path.before:
[Unit]
Description=OpenClaw Gateway (managed by ORIS)
After=network-online.target
Wants=network-online.target

[Service]
Type=simple
Environment=PATH=/home/admin/.npm-global/bin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/bin:/bin
ExecStart=/home/admin/.npm-global/bin/openclaw gateway --port 18789
Restart=always
RestartSec=5

[Install]
WantedBy=default.target
gateway_path.after:
[Unit]
Description=OpenClaw Gateway (managed by ORIS)
After=network-online.target
Wants=network-online.target

[Service]
Type=simple
Environment=PATH=/home/admin/.npm-global/bin:/home/admin/.local/bin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/bin:/bin
ExecStart=/home/admin/.npm-global/bin/openclaw gateway --port 18789
Restart=always
RestartSec=5

[Install]
WantedBy=default.target

🧩 coding-agent △ Needs setup

Delegate coding work to Codex, Claude Code, OpenCode, or Pi as background workers; not simple edits or read-only code lookup.

Details:

  Visible to model: no
  Available as command: no

Requirements:
  Any binaries: ✗ claude, ✗ codex, ✗ opencode, ✗ pi
  Config: ✗ skills.entries.coding-agent.enabled

Install options:
  → Install @anthropic-ai/claude-code (npm)
